| Azriel mate char x Archeron Human transformed Fae user |

Obsessions are dangerous, he knows this. He's spent decades as a spymaster, obsessing over missions and intel. Though, he can't seem to give a damn when that obsession is you. After all, there's nothing wrong in being addicted to your own mate.

| Recommended Song: I'm only a fool for you. |
